# x402-api — DeFi Data API for AI Agents

> Pay-per-call crypto & DeFi data. No API keys. USDC micropayments on Base via x402 protocol.

## Base URL
https://x402-api.fly.dev

## Identity
- ERC-8004 Agent #18763 on Base
- Payment wallet: 0x60264c480b67adb557efEd22Cf0e7ceA792DefB7
- USDC contract (Base): 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913

## Endpoints

### GET /api/price-feed — 0.001 USDC
BTC, ETH, SOL prices + top 5 movers/losers by 24h change. 60s cache.

### GET /api/gas-tracker — 0.001 USDC
Gas prices on Ethereum, Base, Polygon, Arbitrum. Slow/normal/fast tiers + USD estimates.

### GET /api/dex-quotes — 0.002 USDC
Swap quotes across Uniswap V3, SushiSwap, 1inch. Params: ?from=ETH&to=USDC&amount=1

### GET /api/token-scanner — 0.003 USDC
Token security: contract verification, honeypot check, liquidity lock, mint function, risk score. Params: ?token=PEPE

### GET /api/whale-tracker — 0.005 USDC
Large transfers, holder concentration, Gini coefficient. Params: ?token=ETH

### GET /api/yield-scanner — 0.005 USDC
Top DeFi yields: Aave, Compound, Morpho, Lido, Pendle, Ethena. Filter by chain, asset, TVL.

### GET /api/funding-rates — 0.008 USDC
Perp funding rates on Hyperliquid, dYdX v4, Aevo, GMX, Drift, Vertex + arb spread ranking. Params: ?asset=ETH

### GET /api/wallet-profiler — 0.008 USDC
Wallet portfolio: holdings, DeFi positions, activity metrics, risk classification. Params: ?address=0x...

## Free Endpoints
- GET /health — Server health check
- GET /api/endpoints — Machine-readable endpoint catalog (JSON)
- GET /api/bazaar — Bazaar discovery schemas
- GET /.well-known/agent-registration.json — ERC-8004 registration

## Payment Flow
1. Agent calls endpoint without payment → receives 402 with payment instructions
2. Agent pays on Base and retries with X-Payment header containing Base64 JSON proof
3. Current production-ready proof format in this repo: {"txHash":"0x...","payer":"0x..."}
4. Server verifies the on-chain USDC transfer and returns data

## Notes
- The repo also contains a partial EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization verifier
- Signature-based settlement is not fully wired through in this codebase yet

## Integrations
- MCP Server: @x402-api/mcp-server
- MCP Server Repo: https://github.com/fernsugi/x402-api-mcp-server
- ElizaOS Plugin: @x402-api/elizaos-plugin
- x402-fetch (Coinbase): automatic 402 → pay → retry
